notes: Phase 1 dry-run rubric ONLY. Not for Phase 2. Delete after Phase 2 HOSP-02 ships real rubric.

features.name: Hero image / banner
features.yes_criterion: Page shows a large above-the-fold hero image or video banner occupying at least 1/3 of the initial viewport, related to hospitality/VIP/matchday experiences.

features.name: Primary CTA button
features.yes_criterion: Page has at least one visually-primary call-to-action button (high-contrast, non-text-link style) leading to enquiry, booking, or package selection.

features.name: Hospitality tiers or packages list
features.yes_criterion: Page displays two or more distinct hospitality packages, tiers, or seating-level options (e.g. 'Silver', 'Gold', 'Platinum' or named suites), with some structural distinction (cards, table, or grid).
